summary: A stateless nation under Israeli military occupation seeking internationally-recognised statehood. The West Bank is governed by the Palestinian Authority; Gaza was governed by Hamas until the 2023-2024 war. Over 5 million Palestinians live in refugee camps across the region.

history.detail: Britain promises a Jewish homeland in Palestine without consulting the Arab majority already living there.
Palestinians revolt against British rule and Jewish immigration; brutally suppressed.
UN proposes 56% of land to Jewish state (one-third of population); Arabs reject as unjust.
700,000+ Palestinians flee or expelled during creation of Israel; 500+ villages destroyed.
Palestine Liberation Organisation founded in Cairo; Yasser Arafat takes control 1969.
Israel occupies West Bank, Gaza, East Jerusalem in Six-Day War. Occupation continues.
Palestinian uprising against occupation; rocks vs. soldiers; lasting political impact.
PLO recognises Israel; Israel recognises PLO; Palestinian Authority created to govern parts of West Bank and Gaza.
Peace talks collapse; five years of violence kill ~3,000 Palestinians and ~1,000 Israelis.
Hamas wins Palestinian legislative elections; US/Israel refuse to recognise; Gaza blockade imposed.
Hamas seizes Gaza; West Bank run by PA (Fatah); Palestinian polity divided.
Hamas kills ~1,200 Israelis; Israel's response kills 40,000+ Palestinians, displaces 2M, destroys most of Gaza's infrastructure.

finance.currency_role: No independent currency; uses Israeli Shekel, Jordanian Dinar, USD

tech_startups.vc_ecosystem: Extremely limited due to occupation restrictions on movement, imports, and finance

resources.oil_gas: Gaza offshore gas field (discovered; blocked from development by Israel)
resources.water: Severe water crisis; Palestinians in West Bank have 20% of the per-capita water access of Israeli settlers
resources.agriculture: Olive groves (culturally central); Israeli restrictions limit farming in much of West Bank

follow_the_money.detail: PA almost entirely dependent on EU, US, Arab donor funding; periodically cut as political pressure
Israel collects taxes on behalf of PA, regularly withholds as punishment

theories_disputed.detail: South Africa filed ICJ case alleging Israel committing genocide in Gaza 2024; ICJ ordered provisional measures; final ruling pending.
Many Palestinian scholars argue Oslo legitimised occupation while fragmenting Palestinian governance without path to statehood.

connections.detail: Military occupation of West Bank; war in Gaza
Historical relationship; many Palestinians are Jordanian citizens
Qatar funds Hamas via UN-approved payments; major donor to Gaza
Iran arms Hamas and Islamic Jihad
